input: anonymous user behavior sequences (sessions) converted into session graphs and global graphs
output: next item prediction (ranking of candidate items)
backbone: time series enhanced graph neural network (TSGNN) with intra-session and inter-session graph learning
loss: cross-entropy loss (implied by next-item prediction task)
key_idea: assign temporal labels to edges in session graphs for intra-session order learning and construct global graphs across sessions for inter-session dynamic interest modeling
